title: Brent oil dips below $80 as postponed U.S.-Iran talks temper optimism over ceasefire progress
summary_full: With immediate supply fears fading and tanker traffic returning to the Strait of Hormuz, traders are turning their attention back to oil demand and OPEC's outlook for the market.
summary_public: With immediate supply fears fading and tanker traffic returning to the Strait of Hormuz, traders are turning their attention back to oil demand and OPEC's outlook for the market.
